attributes.description: User is unable to complete checkout.
attributes.name: Checkout failure

200.html:
data [required]

[object]

Array of RUM replay analysis issue data objects.

attributes [required]

object

Attributes of a RUM replay analysis issue.

affected_sessions [required]

[object]

Up to three sample sessions affected by this issue.

session_id [required]

string

Unique identifier of the affected session.

session_start_timestamp_ms

int64

Session start timestamp in milliseconds.

application_id [required]

string

Unique identifier of the application where the issue was detected.

created_at [required]

date-time

Timestamp when the issue was first detected.

description [required]

string

Human-readable description of the issue.

journey_query

object

Journey query associated with the issue.

name [required]

string

Name of the issue.

representative_session [required]

object

A representative session illustrating a replay analysis issue.

issue_category [required]

string

Category of the issue observed in this session.

llm_analysis_details [required]

object

AI-generated analysis details for a replay issue.

intent [required]

string

Interpreted user intent derived from session analysis.

user_pattern [required]

[string]

List of user behavior steps observed in the session.

screenshot

object

A screenshot captured during a replay session.

screenshot_key [required]

string

Filename or key identifier of the screenshot.

session_id [required]

string

Unique identifier of the session where the screenshot was taken.

timestamp_ms [required]

int64

Timestamp of the screenshot in milliseconds.

view_id [required]

string

Unique identifier of the view where the screenshot was taken.

session_id [required]

string

Unique identifier of the representative session.

session_start_timestamp_ms [required]

int64

Session start timestamp in milliseconds.

signals [required]

[object]

List of signals observed in the representative session.

event [required]

string

Event name associated with the signal.

signal_type [required]

string

Type of signal captured.

timestamp_ms [required]

int64

Absolute timestamp of the signal in milliseconds.

user_pattern [required]

string

User behavior pattern identified for the signal.

view_name

string

Name of the view where the issue was observed.

session_count [required]

int64

Total number of sessions affected by this issue.

severity [required]

string

Severity level of the issue. Valid values are high, medium, and low.

updated_at [required]

date-time

Timestamp when the issue was last updated.

validation_verdict [required]

string

Validation status of the issue.

id [required]

string

Unique identifier of the issue.

type [required]

enum

RUM replay analysis issue resource type. Allowed enum values: issues

default: issues

meta [required]

object

Metadata object for paginated issue list responses.

page [required]

object

Pagination metadata for a RUM replay analysis response.

total_filtered_count [required]

int64

Total number of items matching the current filters.

400.html:
errors [required]

[object]

A list of errors.

detail

string

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the error.

meta

object

Non-standard meta-information about the error

source

object

References to the source of the error.

header

string

A string indicating the name of a single request header which caused the error.

parameter

string

A string indicating which URI query parameter caused the error.

pointer

string

A JSON pointer to the value in the request document that caused the error.

status

string

Status code of the response.

title

string

Short human-readable summary of the error.
